reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle on beam source entities and pair the sprite with a raycast emitter component that owns direction and width data.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_fixed_light_emitter_32x32.png through AssetServer during level spawn and attach it to fixed emitter entities.
runtime_notes: Pulse loop runs at 6 fps and does not affect gameplay beam timing.
Beam origin is the center of the front lens at x=24 y=16 within the 32x32 frame.
A separate shader beam mesh handles the long light strip rather than stretching the sprite.

context.usage: Primary stationary beam source used to define danger lanes and reflection puzzles on each floor.

shape.silhouette: Compact wall mounted lamp with a forward lens cone, gold housing, and bright core aperture.

specs.texture: Metal housing with bright glass lens and a subtle warm core pulse.
specs.shading: White hot lens center with amber halo and dark violet housing shadows.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x32 px with six 32x32 frames.
Lens center stays fixed at x=24 y=16 in every frame for stable beam origin placement.
Pulse brightness changes only inside the lens and core aperture while the outer housing contour remains unchanged.
